label: Java: Compile & Run (hello)
command: javac -encoding UTF-8 -d hello/out hello/src/$ZED_STEM.java; if ($?) { java -cp hello/out $ZED_STEM }

label: Java: Compile & Run (java-basic-1)
command: javac -encoding UTF-8 -d java-basic-1/out java-basic-1/src/$ZED_STEM.java; if ($?) { java -cp java-basic-1/out $ZED_STEM }
